title: Aran
desc: Aran, a Malayalam remake, is based on true events that is a relationship between a soldier Mohanlal and a soldier who are part of a mission in Kashmir border.

desc: Exclusive festive special featuring candid celebrity interviews, Tamil cinema updates, and behind-the-scenes stories that bring fans closer to their favorite stars.

title: Pollachi Maaplea
desc: Indian Tamil comedy film directed by R. Lakshmanan. The film features Sathyaraj and Susan in lead roles with Goundamani in a pivotal role.

desc: Amrita's parents are killed by a troubled teenager and her adopted brother, Athidhi, is framed for the crime and arrested. Fourteen years later, Athidhi tries to hunt down the real killer.

desc: This book dives into the fascinating world of Tamil cinema, revealing intriguing unknown facts about famous personalities, driven by the extraordinary desires that shape their lives.

title: Paiya
desc: Shiva, an unemployed graduate, falls in love with Charulatha. However, when on Charulatha's request, he drives her to Mumbai, the two are chased down by two different gangs for different reasons.

title: Dhanam
desc: Dhanam is born to a family of hereditary sex workers and true to her bloodline, she grows up to be one of the finest in the business in the city of Hyderabad.
